title: Inventory Trash Can
description: Adds a simple and clean trash can slot to your inventory to easily delete items.
body:
# 🗑️ Inventory Trash Can

Keep your inventory clean and organized! **Inventory Trash Can** is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly Quality of Life mod that adds a convenient trash button directly to your survival inventory screen.

## ✨ Features

- **🗑️ One-Click Trash:** Click the trash button while holding an item to permanently delete it
- **📦 Bulk Delete:** Hold **Shift** and click to delete ALL matching items in your inventory at once  
- **↩️ Undo Support:** Click with an empty cursor to restore the last trashed item stack
- **🔍 Highlight Mode:** Matching items glow to easily spot what you're about to delete
- **🔢 Item Counter:** See exactly how many of each item you have in your inventory
- **⚙️ Configurable Position:** Move the trash button to any corner of your inventory screen
- **🔄 Desync-Free:** Fully server-authoritative — no ghost items or visual glitches
- **💨 Lightweight:** Minimal code, zero lag, no unnecessary bloat

## 🖼️ Screenshots

![Trash Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cukkoo12/inventory-trash-can/main/images/trash-button.png)
*Click the trash button to delete the item on your cursor*

![Bulk Delete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cukkoo12/inventory-trash-can/main/images/bulk-delete.png)
*Hold Shift to delete all matching items at once*

![Highlight](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cukkoo12/inventory-trash-can/main/images/highlight.png)
*Matching items are highlighted for easy identification*

![Count Display](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cukkoo12/inventory-trash-can/main/images/count-display.png)
*Built-in counter shows item quantities at a glance*

## 🎮 How to Use

1. Open your survival inventory
2. Pick up any item or stack you want to trash
3. **Click the Trash Button** → item deleted permanently
4. **Shift + Click** → delete all matching items in your inventory
5. **Empty cursor + Click** → restore the last trashed item

## 📦 Supported Versions

| Version | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge |
|---------|:------:|:-----:|:--------:|
| 26.1.2 | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ |
| 1.21.4 | ✔️ | — | ✔️ |
| 1.20.1 | ✔️ | ✔️ | — |

## ⚙️ Requirements

**Fabric:** Fabric Loader + Fabric API  
**Forge:** Forge 64+  
**NeoForge:** NeoForge 4+
